headline: Hospital Chains Stocks Q1 Teardown: HCA Healthcare (NYSE:HCA) Vs The Rest
summary: As the Q1 earnings season wraps, let’s dig into this quarter’s best and worst performers in the hospital chains industry, including HCA Healthcare (NYSE:HCA) and its peers.
